zh.lifeSummary: 當John Fairfax於大約1547年出生在英國諾福爾可諾維其時，他的父親William Fairfax Knt.50歲，母親Ann Baker47歲。他於1580年10月10日與Maria Birch在英國英格蘭諾福爾可可斯藍尼結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1614年在他的家鄉享年68歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Fairfax于大约1547年出生在英国諾福爾可諾維其时，他的父亲William Fairfax Knt.50岁，母亲Ann Baker47岁。他于1580年10月10日与Maria Birch在英国英格兰諾福爾可可斯藍尼结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1614年在他的家乡享年68岁。

nameMeanings.name: Fairfax
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname for someone with beautiful long hair, from Middle English fair fax ‘beautiful tresses’. This was a common descriptive phrase in Middle English: the alliterative poem Sir Gawain and the Green Knight refers to ‘fair fanning fax’ encircling the shoulders of the doughty warrior.
History: Thomas Fairfax (1693–1781), an army officer from Leeds Castle, Kent, England, first came to VA in 1735 and settled on maternal estates there as a proprietor in 1747.

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When John Fairfax was born about 1547, in Norwich, Norfolk, England, his father, William Fairfax Knt., was 50 and his mother, Ann Baker, was 47. He married Maria Birch on 10 October 1580, in Coslany, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 5 daughters. He died in 1614, in his hometown, at the age of 68.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Fairfax est né environ 1547, à Norwich, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, William Fairfax Knt., avait 50 ans et sa mère, Ann Baker, avait 47 ans. Il a épousé Maria Birch le 10 octobre 1580, à Coslany, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé en 1614, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 68 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Fairfax è nato il circa 1547 nel Norwich, Norfolk, England, il suo padre, William Fairfax Knt., aveva 50 anni e il suo madre, Ann Baker, aveva 47 anni. Lui sposato Maria Birch il 10 ottobre 1580, nel Coslany, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1614, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 68 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Fairfaxが約1547年にイギリスノーフォルクノーウィチで生まれた時，父William Fairfax Knt.は50歳，母Ann Bakerは47歳であった。1580年10月10日にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクコスラニーでMaria Birchと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1614年に故郷で68歳で死去した。

ko.Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England, Unite: 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈
ko.lifeSummary: John Fairfax(이)가 대략 1547년 영국 노르폴크 노위치에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Fairfax Knt.(은)는 50세였고, 그의 어머니 Ann Baker(은)는 47세였다. 그는 1580년 10월 10일 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 코슬랜이에서 Maria Birch(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1614년 그의 고향에서 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Fairfax nasceu aproximadamente 1547, em Norwich, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Fairfax Knt., tinha 50 anos e sua mãe, Ann Baker, tinha 47 anos. Ele casou-se com Maria Birch em 10 de outubro de 1580, em Coslany, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1614, em sua cidade natal, com 68 anos.

ru.Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England, Unite: бури ст эдмундс, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Fairfax родился около 1547 г. в местности норвич, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени William Fairfax Knt. было 50 лет, а матери, которую звали Ann Baker, 47. Он женился на женщине по имени Maria Birch 10 октября 1580 г. в местности кослани, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 5 дочерей. Он умер в 1614 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 68 лет.

Se casó con Maria Birch el 10 de octubre de 1580, en Coslany, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 5 hijas. Murió en 1614, en su pueblo, a la edad de 68 años.
